basic_details.job_title: GSSSB X-Ray Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 16 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) X-Ray Technician Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://gsssb.gujarat.gov.in/. A total of 16 vacancies have been announced through the GSSSB X-Ray Technician Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 36 years Age relaxation is applicable up to 10 years for PwD (maximum 45 years) as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in Science, X-Ray Technician course, Basic computer knowledge, Knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi
qualification.details: Bachelor’s degree in Science from a recognized university. X-Ray Technician course from a Government Institute or Medical College recognized by the National Medical Council. Basic knowledge of computer application. Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both.

salary_details.details: Rs. 40,800/- fixed per month for the first 5 years, then Pay Level-6 (Rs. 35,400 - 1,12,400).

selection_process: CBRT/OMR MCQ Exam (Part-A and Part-B) Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download GSSSB X-Ray Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download GSSSB X-Ray Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.gujarat_subordinate_service_selection_bo: Bachelor’s degree in Science, X-Ray Technician course, Basic computer knowledge, Knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi

content_sections.heading: GSSSB X-Ray Technician Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the GSSSB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download GSSSB X-Ray Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: GSSSB X-Ray Technician Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Bachelor’s degree in Science from a recognized university. X-Ray Technician course from a Government Institute or Medical College recognized by the National Medical Council. Basic knowledge of computer application. Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both.

content_sections.heading: GSSSB X-Ray Technician Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 36 years Age relaxation is applicable up to 10 years for PwD (maximum 45 years) as per rules.

content_sections.heading: GSSSB X-Ray Technician Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 40,800/- fixed per month for the first 5 years, then Pay Level-6 (Rs. 35,400 - 1,12,400).

content_sections.heading: GSSSB X-Ray Technician Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
GSSSB X-Ray Technician Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: CBRT/OMR MCQ Exam (Part-A and Part-B) Document Verification Merit List

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GSSSB X-Ray Technician Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSSSB X-Ray Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the GSSSB X-Ray Technician posts is 13th July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the X-Ray Technician post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s degree in Science, a recognized X-Ray Technician course, basic computer knowledge, and proficiency in Gujarati or Hindi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 36 years. Age relaxation is provided for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the X-Ray Technician post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 16 vacancies announced for the X-Ray Technician position by the Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for GSSSB X-Ray Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 400/- for General/OBC and SC/ST categories. This fee needs to be paid online during the application process.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the GSSSB X-Ray Technician role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a CBRT/OMR MCQ Exam, followed by Document Verification, and finally, the preparation of a Merit List.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the X-Ray Technician position?
faq.answer: The salary starts at Rs. 40,800/- fixed per month for the initial 5 years, after which it moves to Pay Level-6, ranging from Rs. 35,400 to Rs. 1,12,400 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification specifies that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Gujarat. It's advisable to check the official notification for specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q9. How can I check the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It contains all detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official website of GSSSB?
faq.answer: The official website of the Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board is provided in the 'Important Links' section for your reference.
